productDisplayName: Timberland Women Petits Purple Casual Shoes
description: Make your little girl feel like a princess in this pair of timberland Sugarberry Tall boots. The pearlised patent leather and ripstop nylon upper are not only water resistant and stylish, but they also keep her safe from the winter chill. Team this comfy footwear pair with short skirts and pretty tops and watch your little girl skip away in style.UpperPearlised patented leather and ripstop nylon upper for waterproofing and durabilityFaux fur lining with inner insulation for absolute comfortPull-tight collar with nylon drawstrings for a snug, customised FitBrand badge on lateral leg for stylePadded fabric footbed for sweat-free all-day comfortOutsoleDurable grippy rubber outsole with multi-directional lugs throughout for absolute grip and tractionOutsole embeded onto the upper as a toe guard and heel guard for enhanced durabilityBoot careWipe dust with a damp, clean clothDo not wash or store in direct sunlight
